title: rubus coriicolor
intro: Rubus coriicolor, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of raspberry plant native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Rubus coriicolor include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Rubus coriicolor include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make capsules, pills, or applied topically as a poultice or salve.
